# Simple CAPI

Simple CAPI is a web application for launching and managing secure Meta Conversions API tracking across client accounts.

## Product direction

Simple CAPI creates isolated server-side conversion endpoints, keeps Meta credentials out of browser code, and supports browser/server event deduplication for Lead and Schedule events.

## Endpoint scope

One endpoint belongs to one client and Meta dataset. It can be used across that client's landing pages, while a different client or dataset requires a separate endpoint.

## Canonical page

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage.
